requirements: Build, test, and maintain low-code solutions
Translate clear business requirements into functional Power Apps and Power Automate workflows
Work under the guidance of senior developers
Support existing applications
Help users get the most out of the Microsoft 365 ecosystem
Design, develop, and implement solutions using Power Platform tools including Power Apps and Power Automate
Customize and extend SharePoint Online lists, libraries, workflows, permissions, and site structures
Collaborate with business stakeholders to gather requirements and translate them into technical solutions
Maintain and improve existing applications and workflows
Troubleshoot and resolve issues across the M365 environment
Provide end-user support, training, and documentation for developed solutions
Ensure best practices in governance, security, and performance are followed
Participate in code reviews and contribute to continuous improvement
Handle approximately 70% troubleshooting and support of current applications and 30% new development
2+ years of experience in development within the M365 solutions stack as a Power Platform Developer
Deep expertise in M365 environment with focus on low-code services including SharePoint, Power Apps, Power Automate, Dataverse, and AI Builder
Knowledge of Entra ID, Conditional Access, and Identity Governance
Experience with lifecycle management, external sharing policies, and license optimization
Experience in other low-code/no-code platforms is an advantage
Basic knowledge of .NET or SPFx framework is an advantage
Experience in automation using PowerShell, Python, or other languages is an advantage
Fluent or advanced level of English
Ability to work independently and as part of a team
Proactive attitude and eagerness to learn new technologies
Strong willingness to support and collaborate with end users
Focus on timely and high-quality incident resolution
Ability to translate technical requests into tangible business value and user adoption
Proven ability to lead the resolution of high-impact platform outages or security incidents
Ability to provide clear, non-technical status updates to user audiences
Ability to communicate KPIs to higher management level
jd.employerSignal: The employer emphasizes hybrid work, flexible hours, 37.5-hour work week, vacation and flexible days, training and certifications, language courses, LinkedIn Learning, employee assistance program, pension contribution, renovated offices, volunteer days, team culture, and recognition among top employers in South Moravia through Employer of the Year awards.
risks: The role is support-heavy, with 70% troubleshooting and support of current applications and 30% new development.
The JD says the developer will work under guidance of senior developers, suggesting the role may be less senior than some candidates expect.
The role requires hybrid presence at Atlas Copco Services, s.r.o. in Brno, Czech Republic.
The JD combines low-code development with M365 administration, identity governance, license optimization, and incident response expectations.
The JD asks for proven ability to lead high-impact platform outage or security incident resolution, which may be a higher bar than the 2+ years experience requirement suggests.
Fluent or advanced English is required.

careerProfile.identity: Li Ting Kao / Christine Kao; Business Process Engineer / IS BA with enterprise AI, chatbot operations, Power Platform automation, Power BI analytics, Workday/HRIS, HR technology, AI governance, compliance workflow, API integration, and cross-region stakeholder delivery experience.
targetRoles: AI Product Operations / AI Program Specialist
Data / BI Analyst for HR technology
careerProfile.positioning: Business-to-technology translator who turns operational problems into enterprise automation, BI dashboards, AI assistant workflows, governance controls, API integrations, and maintainable internal systems. Strongest grounded positioning is Trend Micro enterprise internal technology delivery across Global HR, Customer Support, IS/IT, Legal/Privacy, AI governance, recruiting, payroll, onboarding, and regional operations.

workExperiences.scope: Retail analytics, Tableau dashboards, client requirements, hardware/software integration, vendor coordination, and government AI/communication project execution.

Biomedical research, molecular biology/virology experiments, project coordination, lab operations, procurement, inventory, and environmental safety support.

careerProfile.claimBoundaries: Use parsed snapshots as source of truth. Do not invent exact revenue, savings, team size, active user count, formal certifications, formal language level, or external product ownership beyond the source. Prefer built, supported, coordinated, participated, evaluated, maintained, took over, served as BA/interface, or led design sessions according to source-specific wording. Treat internal IDs, endpoint URLs, PO amounts, app/report/environment IDs, named internal stakeholders, workspace IDs, account names, and vendor contacts as internal proof, not external CV wording. Do not claim formal Japanese proficiency from bilingual chatbot content. Do not claim quantified business impact beyond metrics explicitly stated. Preserve title and period conflicts until verified.

selectedSkills.cvWording: Take over and operate production Power Automate flows across HR automation, scheduled syncs, monitoring, and troubleshooting.
selectedSkills.evidenceSummary: Took over production HR automation flows after TOI completion on 2026-06-18, covering AI Screening, COE PDF generation, Japan synchronization, Taiwan attendance import, monitoring, troubleshooting, and credential update responsibilities.

selectedSkills.cvWording: Build Power Platform compliance workflow applications that replace spreadsheet-based processes with structured forms, storage, routing, and review controls.
selectedSkills.evidenceSummary: Built Legal DPIA / AI Impact Assessment workflow using Power Apps, SharePoint List storage, and Power Automate notifications, replacing fragmented Excel-based assessment work with a structured digital process.

selectedSkills.cvWording: Automate recruiting dispatch by synchronizing Workday candidate and requisition data into SharePoint-backed Power Apps workflows.
selectedSkills.evidenceSummary: Built TW CV Auto-Match recruiting dispatch system using Power Automate, Power Apps, Workday RaaS API, SharePoint, and Power BI POC validation to replace manual email dispatch.

selectedSkills.cvWording: Build lifecycle onboarding email automations using learning progress, HR data, fallback logic, and Microsoft Graph email delivery.
selectedSkills.evidenceSummary: Designed and implemented six-trigger SE onboarding email automation using Power Automate, Microsoft Graph API, Workday RaaS API, Docebo progress, mentor fallback, manager fallback, and terminated employee handling; official rollout on 2026-04-23.

selectedSkills.cvWording: Build self-service HR booking workflows with mentor/session selection, SharePoint-backed records, availability controls, and maintainability documentation.
selectedSkills.evidenceSummary: Built Mentor Booking System with Power Apps, MS Forms, and SharePoint List, allowing mentees to select mentors, choose session times, submit sign-up details, view booked sessions immediately, and avoid overbooking through full-capacity hiding logic.

selectedSkills.cvWording: Document Power Platform governance practices covering environment ownership, connection references, licensing, and production transferability.
selectedSkills.evidenceSummary: Created Power Automate and Power Apps business scenario evaluation documentation and established guidance around SharePoint site environments, Connection References, ownership transfer, premium connectors, and license needs.

selectedSkills.skill: Azure AD secret and environment variable maintenance
selectedSkills.cvWording: Maintain production automation credentials and environment variables with documented renewal and publish procedures.
selectedSkills.evidenceSummary: Documented and maintained operational path for Azure AD client secret renewal, Power Automate Environment Variable updates, and mandatory solution publishing for changes to take effect.

selectedSkills.cvWording: Design role-based visibility, reviewer controls, access permissions, and audit logs for sensitive compliance workflows.
selectedSkills.evidenceSummary: Implemented reviewer-only action buttons, submitter risk-light visibility restrictions, editable reviewer fields, comments, attachments, access management, and field-change logging for the DPIA workflow.

selectedSkills.cvWording: Coordinate enterprise AI license trials and conversion tracking using adoption data and stakeholder follow-up.
selectedSkills.evidenceSummary: Led M365 Copilot Trial GO Plus Program operations for 1,000 trial licenses, including activation tracking, low-usage follow-up, conversion reminders, and tracking 357 full-license conversions.

selectedSkills.cvWording: Build Power BI adoption dashboards for enterprise AI tools using audit logs, license data, user lists, and usage exports.
selectedSkills.evidenceSummary: Built the company's first systematic M365 Copilot adoption dashboard in Power BI, integrating CopilotAuditLog, CopilotExportUsers, DL lists, SharePoint, M365 Admin export, and related usage data to track 24 Copilot applications with daily 8 AM refresh.

selectedSkills.cvWording: Build cross-region AI governance registries that centralize project metadata, ownership, status, and risk review inputs.
selectedSkills.evidenceSummary: Built a company-wide IS AI project registration Power App for six regions and supported consolidation of 70+ AI projects into a visible governance inventory.

selectedSkills.cvWording: Translate HR operations requirements into Workday configuration, data migration, reporting, and operating specifications.
selectedSkills.evidenceSummary: Served as IS BA for Workday HCM implementation across Taiwan and Philippines operations, translating HR requirements into configurations, data specifications, reporting needs, and ongoing operations routines.

selectedStories.title: Digitized Legal DPIA workflow with privacy and AI assessment controls
selectedStories.action: Built a Power App with SharePoint List storage, Power Automate notifications, reviewer workflow, comments, attachments, logs, access management, and role-based controls.

selectedStories.title: Resolved recruiting automation defects for reliable data synchronization
selectedStories.action: Fixed Candidate_Skills truncation over 255 characters, foreach limits over 5000 items, non-stop loop issues, missing Position ID cases, and added needed candidate fields.
selectedStories.result: Improved reliability of scheduled recruiting data syncs and reduced defects in Workday-to-SharePoint automation.
cvBullets: Improved recruiting automation reliability by resolving truncation, pagination, loop, missing ID, and field synchronization defects in scheduled Workday-to-SharePoint flows.

selectedStories.title: Automated SE onboarding learning reminder lifecycle
selectedStories.action: Designed six trigger logics, integrated Docebo learning progress and Workday data, used Microsoft Graph API for email sending, added mentor and manager fallback handling, and monitored run history.
selectedStories.result: The SE onboarding reminder automation officially rolled out on Apr 23, 2026 and supported reminder handling for approximately 70 SE records in related source evidence.
cvBullets: Designed and implemented lifecycle email automation for SE onboarding using Docebo learning progress, Workday data, Microsoft Graph email delivery, fallback logic, and monitoring routines.

selectedStories.title: Created reusable low-code and API engagement documentation
selectedStories.action: Authored Power Automate and Power Apps business scenario evaluation materials, wrote How to Engage with Connect One provider/consumer guidance, and documented ownership, connection reference, environment, and license considerations.

selectedStories.title: Built enterprise Copilot adoption visibility for license decisions
selectedStories.action: Integrated Copilot audit logs, user exports, distribution lists, and license data into Power BI, tracked 24 Copilot applications, and set daily 8 AM refresh with department KPI views.
